@dobomode Such a thoughtful concept — journaling has always been powerful, but combining it with AI guidance and emotional care feels really special. Congrats on the launch, can’t wait to try Onsen!

Report

Vasiliy Bobrenkov

Interesting launch! I’m curious, is the app powered by ChatGPT or another LLM? Also, could you share which psychological or therapeutic methods were used in training or designing the system? For example, is it based on CBT, positive psychology, or other frameworks for mental wellness?

Report

AI-generated images to visualize my daily? It sounds like a creative and fun way to journal :D

Report

Christy Chen

Onsen sounds like the kind of tool that could help make daily reflection a real habit. Such a brilliant idea!

Report [...] Hey Product Hunt community! We're excited to introduce Onsen, an AI-powered journaling app designed to enhance your mental wellness and personal growth. 🌟 Onsen blends personalized interactive guidance with emotional care to provide a unique journaling experience. Whether you're looking to reflect on your day, capture memories, or seek support, Onsen is here for you. Key Features: - Guided Experiences: Get insights and prompts tailored to your needs. - Journal Through Chat: Don't like writing? Let Onsen create stunning journal entries for you. - Emotional Care: Experience the warmth of a trusted friend and the wisdom of a life coach. - Voice Conversations: Capture your thoughts and memories effortlessly using voice. - AI Guides: Choose from six unique AI guides, each with a different
